straytags.config.title: StrayTags Configuration
straytags.config.servers.tooltip: List of server addresses where StrayTags is active (e.g. stray.gg)
straytags.config.own_clans.tooltip: Clan names you belong to (case-insensitive exact match)
straytags.config.own_players.tooltip: Player usernames treated as your own (case-insensitive exact match)
straytags.config.allied_clans.tooltip: Clan names of your allies (case-insensitive exact match)
straytags.config.allied_players.tooltip: Player usernames treated as allies (case-insensitive exact match)
straytags.config.enemy_clans.tooltip: Clan names of your enemies (case-insensitive exact match)
straytags.config.enemy_players.tooltip: Player usernames treated as enemies (case-insensitive exact match)
straytags.config.own_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for own clan members. Placeholders: %rank%, %username%, %clan%
straytags.config.allied_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for allied clan members. Placeholders: %rank%, %username%, %clan%
straytags.config.enemy_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for enemy clan members. Placeholders: %rank%, %username%, %clan%
straytags.config.neutral_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for players not in any list. Placeholders: %rank%, %username%, %clan%
straytags.config.no_clan_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for players with no clan tag. Placeholders: %rank%, %username%
straytags.config.name_pattern.tooltip: Regex to parse player display names. Must have named groups: rank (optional), username, clan (optional).
